core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Automotive precision with SaaS utility
Emotion First: Reliability, Speed, and Technical Excellence
Content is King: Data is beautiful. Show, don't just tell.
Negative Space: Use it to group technical data without borders.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in all lighting conditions.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'font-heading' for all H1-H3. Weights: 700 or 800. Letter-spacing: 'tracking-tight'.
usage_rules.data: Use 'font-mono' for VINs, License Plates, Odometer readings, and Prices.

primary.description: Electric Blaze - High visibility red for Actions and Alerts

accent.description: Volt Blue - For information and trust

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-border. Use 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' for a technical, machined look. Avoid large rounded corners.

textures.noise: opacity-5 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

landing_page.structure: Asymmetric layout. Hero section must use large typography (text-7xl+) and 'grid-pattern' background.

forms.alignment: Left aligned labels. Inputs full width.

button.base: rounded-sm font-heading font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200
button.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 text-foreground

card.base: rounded-sm border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden

input.base: rounded-sm border-border bg-background focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary font-sans h-11

badge.base: rounded-sm px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badge.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 dark:bg-emerald-950/30 dark:text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-200 dark:border-emerald-800
badge.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-950/30 dark:text-amber-400 border border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-800
badge.error: bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-950/30 dark:text-red-400 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800

images.description: High-end car dashboard interior, dark mood, technical.
Mechanic working on engine, detail shot.
Close up of tools and motorcycle/car parts.

patterns.hover_card: whileHover={{ y: -4, boxShadow: '0 10px 30px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)' }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
patterns.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}

list_stagger.container: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }} initial='hidden' animate='show'
list_stagger.item: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, x: -20 }, show: { opacity: 1, x: 0 } }}

instructions_to_main_agent: THEME SETUP: Implement a Theme Toggle (Dark/Light). Default to System. Use the provided color tokens in tailwind.config.js.
COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components in 'components/ui' to match the 'rounded-sm' and 'border-slate-200/slate-700' aesthetic.
FONTS: Import Google Fonts in 'index.css' or 'App.css'. Configure Tailwind to use them.
DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links). Format: 'page-element-action' (e.g., 'login-email-input').
LAYOUT: Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the Landing Page and 'Bento Grid' for the Dashboard.
OCR FEATURE: For the Photo Upload with OCR, create a dedicated 'Scanner' interface with a camera viewfinder overlay style.
NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications. Style them to match the theme (black/white/red).
GRAPHS: Use 'recharts' for mileage/cost tracking. Style the lines/bars with the primary color (#FF3B30) and gradients.
universal_guidelines: AVOID AI SLOP: No generic gradients, no centered text everywhere, no 'Inter' font dominance.
INTERACTION IS KEY: Every button must click, every card must hover. Static UI is broken UI.
DENSITY: Dashboards are tools. Don't waste space with 100px margins between data points. Keep it compact but legible.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast ratio > 4.5:1. Use 'text-slate-500' only for non-critical labels.
EMPTY STATES: Never leave a list empty. Show a 'No vehicles found' graphic (ASCII art or SVG) and a clear CTA.
